title: Undertale Additons
description: Items, weapons and armors from the popular game Undertale!
body:
**A mod created using _MCreator_ of the popular game _Undertale_!**

**Undertale additions** brings the iconic _items_ from **Undertale** breaking the barrier between _Minecraft_ and this incredible game with great **_3D_** models! _(and some extras too)_

> # Features
- All **_Weapons_**
- All _Foods_
- All _**Blocks**_
- **_Armors_**
- _miscellaneous_

![Empty gun model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e10702618a3ff10a2a01f0fbe5593d2349dd6b02.png)

> # Coming soon
- Port for other _versions_ and _loaders_

> ## Q&A

1. **Will things be the same as in the game or will there be changes?**
-  Items will have slight changes

2. **Items can be crafted or can only be obtained trough creative mode?**
- All items will have their recipe, some items that are not in the game will be added for some recipes

### Dependences
- None required

### Note
- This mod is currently under active development, several things will be added or changed in the future 

### Credits
- Toby Fox - Creator of _UNDERTALE_, this mod is a fan project inspired by his work
